overview: A modern redesign mockup of the Evisualizers Infotech portfolio page — a web design agency showcase with a filterable project grid, featured work highlights, animated stats, client testimonials, and full dark/light mode support.
features: Filterable portfolio grid by category (Web Design, Mobile Apps, Branding, Digital Marketing)
Featured projects showcase with large cards
Animated stats counter (projects, clients, years, team)
Client testimonials carousel with star ratings
Responsive design for mobile, tablet, and desktop
